calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vivian Leung Lerche telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff Capital One Bank.
Jennifer Mushnick Defendant in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: The claim of exemption of Jennifer Mushnick is granted in part/denied in part. $25.00 per pay period is to be garnished. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)
